app_actor_identity_shape.name: app_actor_identity_shape
app_actor_identity_shape.value:
("app_actor"."actor_type" = 'human' and "app_actor"."identity_provider" is not null and "app_actor"."provider_subject" is not null)
        or ("app_actor"."actor_type" = 'system' and "app_actor"."provider_subject" is null)

approved_business_source_tenant_select.name: approved_business_source_tenant_select
approved_business_source_tenant_select.using:
"approved_business_source"."organization_id" = nullif((select current_setting('app.organization_id', true)), '')::uuid
  and "approved_business_source"."workspace_id" = nullif((select current_setting('app.workspace_id', true)), '')::uuid

approved_business_source_tenant_insert.name: approved_business_source_tenant_insert
approved_business_source_tenant_insert.withCheck:
"approved_business_source"."organization_id" = nullif((select current_setting('app.organization_id', true)), '')::uuid
  and "approved_business_source"."workspace_id" = nullif((select current_setting('app.workspace_id', true)), '')::uuid

approved_fact_version_tenant_select.name: approved_fact_version_tenant_select
approved_fact_version_tenant_select.using:
"approved_fact_version"."organization_id" = nullif((select current_setting('app.organization_id', true)), '')::uuid
  and "approved_fact_version"."workspace_id" = nullif((select current_setting('app.workspace_id', true)), '')::uuid

approved_fact_version_tenant_insert.name: approved_fact_version_tenant_insert
approved_fact_version_tenant_insert.withCheck:
"approved_fact_version"."organization_id" = nullif((select current_setting('app.organization_id', true)), '')::uuid
  and "approved_fact_version"."workspace_id" = nullif((select current_setting('app.workspace_id', true)), '')::uuid

approved_fact_version_supersession_shape.name: approved_fact_version_supersession_shape
approved_fact_version_supersession_shape.value:
("approved_fact_version"."version" = 1 and "approved_fact_version"."supersedes_fact_version_id" is null)
        or ("approved_fact_version"."version" > 1 and "approved_fact_version"."supersedes_fact_version_id" is not null)

approved_fact_version_conflict_shape.name: approved_fact_version_conflict_shape
approved_fact_version_conflict_shape.value:
("approved_fact_version"."review_action" = 'resolve_conflict'
          and "approved_fact_version"."conflict_kind" is not null
          and "approved_fact_version"."conflict_reason_code" is not null)
        or ("approved_fact_version"."review_action" <> 'resolve_conflict'
          and "approved_fact_version"."conflict_kind" is null
          and "approved_fact_version"."conflict_reason_code" is null)

approved_fact_version_governance_reason_.name: approved_fact_version_governance_reason_shape
approved_fact_version_governance_reason_.value:
("approved_fact_version"."governance_status" = 'available' and "approved_fact_version"."governance_reason_code" is null)
        or ("approved_fact_version"."governance_status" in ('restricted', 'disputed')
          and "approved_fact_version"."governance_reason_code" ~ '^[A-Z][A-Z0-9_-]{0,63}$')

fact_candidate_tenant_insert.withCheck:
"fact_candidate"."organization_id" = nullif((select current_setting('app.organization_id', true)), '')::uuid
  and "fact_candidate"."workspace_id" = nullif((select current_setting('app.workspace_id', true)), '')::uuid

fact_candidate_conflict_shape.name: fact_candidate_conflict_shape
fact_candidate_conflict_shape.value:
("fact_candidate"."conflict_kind" = 'none' and "fact_candidate"."conflict_detail" is null)
        or ("fact_candidate"."conflict_kind" <> 'none' and "fact_candidate"."conflict_detail" is not null)

fact_review_decision_tenant_select.name: fact_review_decision_tenant_select
fact_review_decision_tenant_select.using:
"fact_review_decision"."organization_id" = nullif((select current_setting('app.organization_id', true)), '')::uuid
  and "fact_review_decision"."workspace_id" = nullif((select current_setting('app.workspace_id', true)), '')::uuid

fact_review_decision_tenant_insert.name: fact_review_decision_tenant_insert
fact_review_decision_tenant_insert.withCheck:
"fact_review_decision"."organization_id" = nullif((select current_setting('app.organization_id', true)), '')::uuid
  and "fact_review_decision"."workspace_id" = nullif((select current_setting('app.workspace_id', true)), '')::uuid

fact_review_decision_result_shape.name: fact_review_decision_result_shape
fact_review_decision_result_shape.value:
("fact_review_decision"."candidate_disposition" = 'approved'
          and "fact_review_decision"."action" <> 'reject'
          and "fact_review_decision"."approved_fact_version_id" is not null
          and "fact_review_decision"."current_fact_version_id" is null)
        or ("fact_review_decision"."candidate_disposition" = 'rejected'
          and "fact_review_decision"."action" = 'reject'
          and "fact_review_decision"."approved_fact_version_id" is null)
